title: centaurea paniculata subsp. limbata
intro: Centaurea paniculata subsp. limbata, also known as knapweed, is a type of flowering plant in the Asteraceae family. It is primarily known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Centaurea paniculata subsp. limbata typically involve drying the plant's flowers and leaves, then infusing them in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
